title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 302 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12pm, 1pm-5pm Email (503) 623-8175 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-8175 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Walk-ins are welcome, but available on a limited basis. FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. $50 fee for those with no insurance. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. AREA SERVED: Polk County and surrounding areas. SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATIONS AND TUBERCULOSIS SCREENINGS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. POLK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
